description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker Docker image with a docker:dind service. Define a single stage called build and a job named build that runs in this stage. In the build job run the exact commands: docker login -u harbottle -p $docker_hub_password, docker pull harbottle/rpm:latest || true, docker build --pull --cache-from harbottle/rpm:latest -t harbottle/rpm:latest ., and docker push harbottle/rpm:latest. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
